calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF COURT HEARING (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Aug-22-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Elder or Dependent Adult Abuse and TRO hearing this day.

Dept. 204, Judge Peter Busch, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, CSR: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976.

Petitioner: Karen Hanning, present.

No appearance by the Respondent: David Henry Rodriguez.

Matter called at 1:45 pm, no appearance by the Respondent.

The Petitioner is sworn in open court.

The Court hears testimony and after hearing the evidence presented, the Petitioner's order is DENIED.
